title: NYC Elections — Shared Definitions
description: Reusable JSON Schema definitions shared across NYC Board of Elections object schemas. Reconciles fields from the Voting/Poll Sites Open Data dataset and defines the machine-readable shapes that do not yet exist for results/candidates/contests.

x-nyc-commons.note: Geography/identifier/address/money definitions are $ref'd from the canonical nyc-commons set; agency-specific definitions remain local.

Borough.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/Borough); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Borough still resolve.

Coordinates.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/Coordinates); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Coordinates still resolve.

AdminBoundaries.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/AdminBoundaries); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/AdminBoundaries still resolve.

ElectionReference.description: A reference to an Election by date + type.

OfficeDistrict.description: An elective office and the district it represents.
